subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto him who hath quaffed the sealed wine, when the Self-Subsisting descended from the heaven of utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم الی من شرب الرحیق المختوم اذ اتی القیوم من سماء البیان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
